name: newkayak12-claude-skills
description: Claude Code skills organized by topic: engineering, PM, thinking, writing, agents, and more.

plugins.name: develop
plugins.description: Engineering skills: CLI, SQL, clean architecture, clean code, DDD, pragmatic programming, database optimization, chaos engineering, Spring Boot, microservices, Kotlin, TDD, frontend, code documentation, testing, MCP builder, SRE.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Product management skills: user stories, story mapping, story splitting, PRD development, contagious (STEPPS), product discovery (Inspired/Shape Up), OKR planning, and hypothesis-driven development.

plugins.name: think
plugins.description: Thinking and ideation skills: brainstorming, decision making, devil's advocate, problem reframing, retrospective, thought organizing, microinteractions design, negotiation, and first-principles thinking.

plugins.name: write
plugins.description: Writing skills: doc co-authoring, writing plans, skill writing, and writer verification.

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Agent orchestration skills: dispatching parallel agents and subagent-driven development.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Planning skills: executing implementation plans and roadmap planning.

plugins.name: skill
plugins.description: Skill management: create new skills, improve existing ones, validate skill quality, and audit trigger coverage.

plugins.name: completion
plugins.description: Verification before completion: evidence-based workflow to confirm work is done before claiming success.

plugins.name: portfolio
plugins.description: Portfolio and career skills: JD analysis, portfolio rewriting, company research, feedback, pattern extraction, and interview prep.

plugins.name: leadership
plugins.description: Engineering leadership skills: 1-on-1 meetings for managers and ICs, engineer leveling and promotion cases, calibration conversations.
